description: All image assets required by the Solar Return PDF renderer in Replit
instructions: All URLs are public and permanent. Download or fetch directly from these URLs in your Replit PDF renderer.

cakeImages._note: One per zodiac sign. Used on Cover page. Selected by natal Sun sign.

usage.planetImages: Used in Planet Spotlight (3-col grid) and Natal vs SR shift cards. Key matches planet name lowercase.
usage.cakeImages: Used on Cover page. Key matches natal Sun sign lowercase. Also provided as 'cakeImageUrl' in the JSON export.

workflow.step1: In Lovable, user generates a Solar Return chart and clicks a tier export button (T1-T5 or Birthday Gift)
workflow.step2: This produces a JSON file with ALL analysis data. The JSON already includes 'cakeImageUrl' pointing to the correct cake.
workflow.step3: In Replit, paste/upload the JSON. The PDF renderer reads the data and fetches images from the URLs above.
workflow.step4: Planet images are NOT in the JSON export — use this manifest to fetch them by key (e.g. planetImages['sun']).
workflow.step5: Click generate in Replit to produce the PDF.

otherAssets.signColorThemes: Already embedded in the JSON export under 'signColorThemes' — no separate images needed.
otherAssets.profectionWheel: Drawn programmatically via jsPDF canvas — no image file needed.
otherAssets.fonts: Uses Times (built into jsPDF) — no custom font files needed.
